integration_validation_v2.evidence: state_probe.rs:1556-1602 (record_work_state_projection: real PG upsert + in-tx WORK_STATE_PROJECTION_RECORDED event); migration 0115 wired at mod.rs:2107; event family folded into ALL at mod.rs:278. CONCERN: atelier_diagnostics_projections_tests.rs:57-132 only asserts PG row round-trip + bad-evidence rejection; it never asserts the emitted EventLedger event via count_events_for_aggregate, so the proof_target 'EventLedger' half is implemented-but-unproven by this test (stale 'not yet wired' comment at state_probe.rs:1183 / test line 18 is false; 0115 IS wired)

integration_validation_v3.evidence: V2 gap was missing EventLedger assertion. tests/atelier_diagnostics_projections_tests.rs:51-167 mt147 now asserts WORK_STATE_PROJECTION_RECORDED==1 after record, ==2 after idempotent re-record, ==0 for rejected machine-local evidence_ref write, on top of existing PG round-trip. Stale 'not yet wired' comment V2 flagged was removed (846e876e); migrations 0115+0129 wired in ensure_schema.
